pom.xml.general_idea: Update the target Java version from 17 to 21 to align with the migration goal.
Upgrade Quarkus platform from 2.9.2 to 3.15.2, which requires Jakarta EE 10 APIs and JDK 17+ (compatible with 21).
Replace javax.* API dependencies with their jakarta.* equivalents required by Quarkus 3.
Replace the legacy Elasticsearch Java client with the new official Elasticsearch Java client.
Switch from Elasticsearch-based clients to dedicated Quarkus OpenSearch clients.
Update GraalVM JavaScript dependencies to use the new polyglot community artifacts.
Replace the Everit JSON Schema validator with the NetworkNT JSON Schema validator.
Update Swagger annotations to use the v3 core group ID.
Upgrade SLF4J to version 2.0.x which is required for compatibility with newer logging frameworks.

.mvn/jvm.config.general_idea: Add --add-opens flags to allow deep reflection access to internal JDK modules required by libraries or frameworks on JDK 21.
